song.title: Have Thine Own Way
song.lyrics:
[V1] Have Thine own way, Lord! Have Thine own way! Thou art the Potter, I am the clay Mold me and make me after Thy will, While I am waiting, yielded and still
[V2] Have Thine own way, Lord! Have Thine own Way! Search me and try me, Master, today! Whiter than snow, Lord, wash me just now, As in Thy presence humbly I bow
[V3] Have Thine own way, Lord! Have Thine own way! Wounded and weary, help me, I pray! Power, all power, surely is Thine! Touch me and heal me, Saviour divine
[V4] Have Thine own way, Lord! Have Thine own way! Hold o'er my being absolute sway! Fill with Thy Spirit till all shall see Christ only, always, living in nme
